records.commercial_need: make the first slide read as a public product narrative, not an internal workflow report
records.design_observation: Run 2.14 improves when the cover uses one dominant typographic field, one proof object, and hidden trace metadata.
records.layout_selector_obligation: select an editorial cover module when the slide role is cover and the claim can be compressed to one primary sentence
records.typography_obligation: one dominant headline, one short support line, no visible workflow checklist
records.spacing_obligation: reserve more than half the slide for headline/proof negative space
records.product_theater_obligation: show one native proof object or product-state object, not a dashboard grid
records.motion_beat_obligation: cover should imply entry state only; no multi-step visible process rail
records.trace_visibility_obligation: record evidence and workflow fields in manifest/viewer/QA only
records.anti_copy_boundary: derived from internal run review; no external screenshot, layout, logo, frame, or transcript is copied

records.commercial_need: prove the product or system state without exposing the generator workflow as the main visual
records.design_observation: The stronger proof slides frame one product surface as the evidence carrier while trace ids stay off-slide.
records.layout_selector_obligation: select product theater when a proof slide needs a visible before/state/result object
records.typography_obligation: title must stay secondary to the product surface and body text must stay below three short labels
records.spacing_obligation: product surface must own the largest visual area and avoid surrounding equal panels
records.product_theater_obligation: use sanitized native PPT UI objects or generated product-state abstractions, never copied source media
records.motion_beat_obligation: show a state change beat with start, action, and resolved state
records.trace_visibility_obligation: trace fields describe source, memory, gate, and code-module ids in manifest/viewer/QA only
records.anti_copy_boundary: derived from case-pack and run review; no external product screenshot, logo, or source UI layout is copied

records.commercial_need: make the improvement legible as an editorial transformation rather than a grid comparison
records.design_observation: The contrast slide works when the viewer sees a route from weak state to resolved state, not two columns of boxes.
records.layout_selector_obligation: select before-after route for contrast slides that compare old behavior with the product-improved behavior
records.typography_obligation: headline states the delta; before/after labels stay compact and do not become paragraphs
records.spacing_obligation: route composition must avoid symmetric dashboard columns
records.product_theater_obligation: only include product objects when they clarify the after state
records.motion_beat_obligation: encode before, turn, after as a storyboard path rather than equal cards
records.trace_visibility_obligation: workflow rationale stays in manifest fields, not visible gate rails
records.anti_copy_boundary: derived from generated-run comparison; no external layout or tutorial frame is copied

records.commercial_need: make the climax slide feel like a release moment rather than another report page
records.design_observation: The climax becomes stronger when one metric/product state owns the stage and evidence is hidden in trace.
records.layout_selector_obligation: select metric reveal for climax slides with one primary business or product outcome
records.typography_obligation: one metric phrase and one consequence line; no dense evidence list
records.spacing_obligation: hero metric or object must occupy a dominant canvas share
records.product_theater_obligation: metric must connect to a visible product/system state when possible
records.motion_beat_obligation: stage the reveal as hold, scale, resolve
records.trace_visibility_obligation: gate evidence stays in manifest/viewer/QA only
records.anti_copy_boundary: derived from internal metric-climax review; no external keynote frame or chart design is copied

records.commercial_need: close the deck with confidence while honestly preserving public-blocked status internally
records.design_observation: A quiet handoff keeps the slide polished while the release gate remains inspectable outside the public surface.
records.layout_selector_obligation: select quiet handoff for close slides that need a release state, next action, or handoff
records.typography_obligation: use a short closing claim and one concise release note
records.spacing_obligation: avoid ending with a checklist or status table
records.product_theater_obligation: show at most one small product or release-state object
records.motion_beat_obligation: encode close as settle and handoff, not a new proof sequence
records.trace_visibility_obligation: public-blocked reasons stay in result docs and QA, not as visible slide clutter
records.anti_copy_boundary: derived from local generated output and delivery gate; no source visual is copied

records.commercial_need: handle long or evidence-heavy content without shrinking text into unreadable thumbnails
records.design_observation: The next system needs an explicit fallback when editorial layouts receive too much text or too many proof obligations.
records.layout_selector_obligation: select dense evidence compression when content burden exceeds the editorial module text budget
records.typography_obligation: compress to labels, counts, and one takeaway rather than small paragraphs
records.spacing_obligation: cap repeated cards and preserve one dominant read path
records.product_theater_obligation: defer product theater if evidence burden would create crowded UI mimicry
records.motion_beat_obligation: show evidence as grouped beats, not a visible process checklist
records.trace_visibility_obligation: store full evidence ids in trace manifest and show only compressed proof on slide
records.anti_copy_boundary: derived from internal trace and review; no raw tutorial text, transcript, or source visual is copied
